ingredients: 1 green chilli, deseeded and finely chopped
steps: Heat oil in a pan or wok. Add garlic, spring onion, ginger and chilli; cook 3-4 minutes over medium heat.
Add lime juice, then stir in prawns, coconut milk and stock. Simmer gently about 5 minutes until prawns are pink.
Meanwhile cook noodles in boiling water about 4 minutes; drain.
Add noodles to the laksa broth, season to taste, and serve topped with coriander.
tips: Keep the simmer gentle so coconut milk doesn't split; adjust heat with more or fewer chilies and finish with extra lime if needed.

sources.title: Prawn & coconut laksa
sources.publisher: Good Food Middle East (BBC Good Food)
